title: ALD Oxidant as A Tuning Knob for Memory Window Expansion in Ferroelectric FETs for Vertical NAND Applications
summary: Dielectric inserts are widely used to expand the memory window (MW) in ferroelectric FETs (FeFETs) for vertical NAND applications, with prior efforts focused primarily on material selection and stack positioning. Here, we demonstrate that the ALD oxidant used for the Al2O3 interlayer serves as a process-level tuning knob for MW engineering. H2O-grown Al2O3 yields a significantly larger MW (7-8 V) compared to O3 (4 V) for both gate-injection (12/3) and tunnel dielectric (8/3/8) configurations. While the tunnel dielectric (8/3/8) stack maintains robust retention up to 1e4s at 125C despite the larger MW, the gate-injection (12/3) configuration exhibits pronounced retention degradation for the H2O case. The enhanced MW is attributed to higher interlayer leakage associated with H2O-based ALD. These results establish oxidant choice as a key process parameter for co-optimizing MW and retention in ferroelectric NAND technologies.

AI.tldr: 研究发现ALD氧化剂选择是调控铁电FET存储窗口的关键工艺参数，H2O生长的Al2O3比O3能提供更大的存储窗口，但需要权衡保持特性
AI.motivation: 在垂直NAND应用的铁电FET中，介电插层被广泛用于扩展存储窗口。以往研究主要关注材料选择和堆叠位置，本研究探索ALD氧化剂作为工艺层面的调控手段对存储窗口工程的影响
AI.method: 使用不同ALD氧化剂（H2O和O3）生长Al2O3插层，在两种配置（栅注入12/3和隧穿介电8/3/8）下比较存储窗口和保持特性
AI.result: H2O生长的Al2O3比O3提供更大的存储窗口（7-8V vs 4V）。隧穿介电配置在125°C下保持特性良好，而栅注入配置在使用H2O时保持特性显著退化
AI.conclusion: 氧化剂选择是铁电NAND技术中协同优化存储窗口和保持特性的关键工艺参数，H2O基ALD通过更高的插层漏电流实现更大的存储窗口

title: Endohedral Derivatives of the Recently Synthesized Two-Dimensional Fullerene Networks: Electronic and Optical Insights from First-Principles Calculations
summary: The quasi-hexagonal phase of the two-dimensional fullerene network (qHPC$_{60}$), recently synthesized, has emerged as a stable carbon-based material with distinct structural and electronic features. In this work, we employed density functional theory (DFT) calculations to investigate the electronic and optical properties of its endohedral derivatives. The encapsulation of nitrogen, cerium, and strontium atoms inside fullerene cages was systematically analyzed at different concentrations. Our results show that encapsulation preserves the semiconducting backbone of pristine qHPC$_{60}$ while introducing localized electronic states that alter the bandgap and enable new transition channels. Nitrogen encapsulation produces intragap states with potential relevance for discrete optical emission, whereas cerium and strontium generate intraband states near the conduction edge. These modifications induce a red shift of the absorption onset into the visible spectrum, accompanied by enhanced refractive and absorptive responses. The robustness of the electronic structure under reduced concentrations indicates that the fully encapsulated limit adequately represents the system. Overall, the findings highlight impurity-endowed qHPC$_{60}$ as a promising platform for optoelectronic and light-harvesting applications.

AI.tldr: 通过DFT计算研究了二维富勒烯网络qHPC₆₀内包氮、铈、锶原子的电子和光学性质，发现封装能保持半导体骨架的同时引入局域电子态，改变带隙并产生新的跃迁通道，有望用于光电子和光捕获应用。
AI.motivation: 最近合成的二维富勒烯网络qHPC₆₀是一种稳定的碳基材料，具有独特的结构和电子特性。研究其内包衍生物的电子和光学性质，探索其在光电子和光捕获应用中的潜力。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，系统分析了氮、铈、锶原子在富勒烯笼内的封装效应，研究了不同浓度下的电子和光学性质变化。
AI.result: 封装保持了原始qHPC₆₀的半导体骨架，同时引入了局域电子态，改变了带隙并启用了新的跃迁通道。氮封装产生带隙内态，铈和锶在导带边缘产生带内态，导致吸收起始红移到可见光谱，并增强了折射和吸收响应。
AI.conclusion: 杂质修饰的qHPC₆₀是一个有前景的光电子和光捕获应用平台，其电子结构在降低浓度下仍保持稳健，完全封装极限能充分代表系统特性。

title: Intertwined Swirling Polarization States in BaTiO$_3$ with Embedded BaZrO$_3$ Nanoregions
comment: Accepted for publication in Phys. Rev. Lett
summary: Ferroelectric materials embedded with dielectric inclusions offer a unique platform for exploring novel topological polar textures. Using first-principles-based atomistic simulations, we investigate the polarization behavior of a BaTiO$_3$ matrix containing segregated BaZrO$_3$ nanoregions. We demonstrate that the polar texture in three-dimensionally ordered arrays of dielectric inclusions is governed by their size and spacing, revealing three distinct regimes. At large separations, the nanocomposite exhibits bulk-like BaTiO3 phase transitions, while at smaller spacings, interconnected swirling polarization patterns give rise to vortex supercrystal states. We analyze the stabilization mechanisms of these states and show that each regime is characterized by distinct switching behavior. Furthermore, we find that nanocomposites with randomly distributed dielectric inclusions exhibit swirling polarization textures, giving rise to an amorphous network of entangled vortices. Our findings provide new insights into the physics of relaxor ferroelectrics, are consistent with recent experimental observations, and open up new possibilities for designing materials with emergent topological functionalities.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理模拟研究BaTiO₃基质中BaZrO₃纳米区域的极化行为，发现介电夹杂物的尺寸和间距决定了三种不同的极化状态，包括涡旋超晶态和纠缠涡旋网络。
AI.motivation: 研究铁电材料中嵌入介电夹杂物形成的拓扑极性纹理，探索新型拓扑极性的物理机制，为设计具有新兴拓扑功能性的材料提供基础。
AI.method: 采用基于第一性原理的原子模拟方法，研究BaTiO₃基质中包含分离BaZrO₃纳米区域的极化行为，分析三维有序阵列中介电夹杂物的尺寸和间距对极化纹理的影响。
AI.result: 发现三种不同的极化状态：大间距时呈现类似块体BaTiO₃的相变；小间距时形成相互连接的涡旋极化图案，产生涡旋超晶态；随机分布的介电夹杂物则产生涡旋极化纹理，形成纠缠涡旋的非晶网络。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为弛豫铁电体的物理机制提供了新见解，与最近的实验观察一致，并为设计具有新兴拓扑功能性的材料开辟了新可能性。

title: Bias in Universal Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials and its Effects on Fine-Tuning
summary: Universal machine learned interatomic potentials (uMLIPs) embody a growing area of interest due to their transferability across the periodic table, displaying an error of about 0.6 kcal/mol against the Matbench Discovery test set. However, we show that achieving more accurate predictions on out-of-domain tasks requires fine-tuning. Additionally, we investigate the existence and influence of model biases in molecular dynamics (MD) by examining two approaches for data generation: from multiple MD trajectories in parallel, which we call naive fine-tuning, and from a single MD trajectory with fine-tuning after set intervals, which we call periodic fine-tuning. Our results find that naive fine-tuning generates constrained datasets that fail to represent MD simulations, and thus downstream fine-tuned models fail during extrapolation. In contrast, periodic fine-tuning yields models which are more generalizable and accurate, producing low-error dynamics. These findings indicate the role of uMLIP bias in fine-tuning, and highlights the need for multiple fine-tuning steps. Lastly, we relate unphysical behavior to principal component space, and quantify extrapolations through Q-residual analysis, which are useful as a proxy for epistemic uncertainty for larger simulations.

AI.tldr: 研究发现通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs）在跨周期表迁移时存在约0.6 kcal/mol误差，需要通过微调提高外域任务准确性。对比两种数据生成方法：并行MD轨迹的"朴素微调"会产生约束数据集导致外推失败，而单轨迹间隔微调的"周期性微调"能产生更通用、准确的模型。
AI.motivation: 通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs）虽然具有跨周期表的迁移性，但在Matbench Discovery测试集上仍有约0.6 kcal/mol的误差。研究旨在探索如何通过微调提高uMLIPs在外域任务上的准确性，并研究MD模拟中模型偏差的存在和影响。
AI.method: 研究比较了两种数据生成方法：1）从多个并行MD轨迹生成数据的"朴素微调"方法；2）从单个MD轨迹在设定间隔进行微调的"周期性微调"方法。通过分析主成分空间中的非物理行为，并使用Q残差分析量化外推，作为大尺度模拟中认知不确定性的代理指标。
AI.result: 朴素微调生成的约束数据集无法代表MD模拟，导致下游微调模型在外推时失败。相比之下，周期性微调产生的模型更具通用性和准确性，能生成低误差的动力学。研究还发现uMLIP偏差在微调中的作用，并强调需要多次微调步骤。
AI.conclusion: uMLIPs的微调策略对模型性能有显著影响。周期性微调优于朴素微调，能产生更通用和准确的模型。主成分空间分析和Q残差分析有助于识别非物理行为并量化外推不确定性，这对大规模模拟的可靠性评估具有重要意义。

title: Localized intrinsic bond orbitals decode correlated charge migration dynamics
summary: For decades, scientists have studied the intricate charge migration dynamics, where after ionization a localized charge distribution ("hole") migrates across the molecule on a femtosecond timescale. This has the potential for controlling electrons in molecules, yet a comprehensive understanding of the many aspects of charge migration is still missing. In this work, we analyze charge migration using an extension of localized intrinsic bond orbitals (IBOs). These orbitals lead to a compact representation of the dynamics and map the complex, correlated many-electron charge migration to chemical concepts such as curly arrows and orbital-orbital interactions. By analyzing multiple challenging scenarios, we show how IBOs enable us to identify key mechanisms in charge migration. For example, we show that different mechanisms are responsible for converting a $π$-shaped hole to a $σ$-shaped hole and vice versa. We explain these in terms of hyperconjugation interactions and configurations that couple orbitals with different symmetries. We further demonstrate how IBOs can be used to find molecules with high charge migration efficiency. We carry out all simulations using an efficient set up of the time-dependent density matrix renormalization group (TDDMRG), correlating as many as 45 electrons in 50 orbitals. We believe that our results will be useful to design future experiments. The proposed IBO analysis is applicable to other types of real-time electron dynamics and spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用扩展的局域本征键轨道(IBOs)分析电荷迁移，将复杂的多电子动力学映射到化学概念，并识别关键机制。
AI.motivation: 电荷迁移在飞秒时间尺度上控制分子中电子的潜力巨大，但目前对其多方面机制的理解仍不完整，需要新的分析方法。
AI.method: 使用扩展的局域本征键轨道(IBOs)分析电荷迁移，结合时间依赖密度矩阵重整化群(TDDMRG)方法，在50个轨道中关联多达45个电子进行模拟。
AI.result: IBOs能够识别电荷迁移的关键机制，如π形空穴与σ形空穴相互转换的不同机制，解释为超共轭相互作用和不同对称性轨道的耦合构型。
AI.conclusion: IBO分析为理解电荷迁移提供了化学直观的框架，有助于设计高效电荷迁移分子和未来实验，该方法也适用于其他实时电子动力学和光谱学研究。

title: Bridge Scaling in Conditioned Henyey-Greenstein Random Walks
summary:
We study fixed-length bridge paths -- half-space excursions that start and end at a planar boundary -- for three-dimensional random walks with Henyey-Greenstein scattering angles and exponentially distributed step lengths, using Monte Carlo simulation over asymmetry parameter g from 0 to 0.95 and path lengths from 4 to 200 steps. The key structural feature is that the walk evolves on a two-dimensional Markovian state space (depth, direction cosine) rather than the scalar depth coordinate alone.
  Four anomalies with respect to classical Brownian-excursion theory are reported. The mean amplitude scales super-diffusively, as path length to a power of 0.57--0.58 for isotropic scattering, nine standard deviations above the Brownian prediction of 0.5, with no sign of convergence out to 200 steps. The diffusion coefficient scales as the transport mean free path to the power 0.415 rather than the predicted 1.0. The midpoint depth distribution is Rayleigh rather than half-normal, consistent with a two-dimensional Bessel process. The bridge-conditioned mean direction cosine converges to minus two-thirds at the final step, independently of the asymmetry parameter and initial direction -- the classical Milne result anchored by the H-function moment identity.
  All anomalies are attributed to the two-dimensional state-space structure. The two anomalous exponents sum to approximately unity, suggesting a common geometric origin. Whether this constitutes a permanent universality-class shift or an anomalously slow crossover to Brownian-excursion behaviour remains the primary open question.

AI.tldr: 研究三维随机行走中固定长度桥路径的异常行为，发现与经典布朗运动理论存在四个显著差异，包括超扩散振幅缩放、扩散系数异常缩放、中点深度分布为瑞利分布而非半正态分布，以及桥条件方向余弦收敛于-2/3。
AI.motivation: 研究三维随机行走中固定长度桥路径（半空间偏移）的结构特征，特别是当行走在二维马尔可夫状态空间（深度，方向余弦）而非仅标量深度坐标上演化时，与经典布朗偏移理论的差异。
AI.method: 使用蒙特卡洛模拟研究Henyey-Greenstein散射角和指数分布步长的三维随机行走，覆盖不对称参数g从0到0.95，路径长度从4到200步。
AI.result: 发现四个异常：1) 平均振幅超扩散缩放（幂指数0.57-0.58）；2) 扩散系数缩放为传输平均自由程的0.415次幂而非1.0；3) 中点深度分布为瑞利分布而非半正态分布；4) 桥条件方向余弦收敛于-2/3。所有异常归因于二维状态空间结构。
AI.conclusion: 三维随机行走桥路径表现出与经典布朗偏移理论显著不同的行为，这些异常源于二维状态空间结构。两个异常指数之和约为1，暗示共同几何起源。主要开放问题是这是否构成永久普适类转变还是异常缓慢的布朗偏移行为交叉。

title: Plasmon-driven exciton formation in a non-equilibrium Fermi liquid
comment: Main Text (including Methods and references) and Supplementary Information (10 + 26 pages, 5 + 13 figures, 0 + 3 tables)
summary: Collective modes in Fermi liquids are usually regarded as dissipation channels that relax electronic excitations through Landau damping. Whether such modes can instead mediate the formation of correlated electronic states under non-equilibrium conditions remains an open question. Here we show that, under optical photo-doping, a bulk plasmon can drive correlated inter-band transfer within a transient electronic continuum. Using time- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (Tr-ARPES) on EuCd$_2$As$_2$ supported by electronic structure calculations, we observe that at high excitation density, plasmons transfer energy from a weakly dispersing bulk band into unoccupied surface states. This bulk-to-surface redistribution stabilizes a long-lived, energy-localized spectral feature consistent with a Mahan exciton. Our results uncover a non-equilibrium regime of Fermi-liquid physics in which collective modes do not merely dissipate energy, but also stabilize correlated bound states.

AI.tldr: 在非平衡条件下，费米液体中的集体模式（等离子体）不仅耗散能量，还能稳定相关束缚态，形成马汉激子。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为费米液体中的集体模式主要通过朗道阻尼耗散电子激发。本文探索在非平衡条件下，这些集体模式是否能介导形成相关电子态。
AI.method: 使用时间-角分辨光电子能谱（Tr-ARPES）研究EuCd₂As₂，结合电子结构计算，观察高激发密度下等离子体如何将能量从弱色散体带转移到未占据表面态。
AI.result: 观察到等离子体将能量从体带重新分布到表面态，稳定了长寿命、能量局域化的光谱特征，与马汉激子一致。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了费米液体物理的非平衡机制：集体模式不仅能耗散能量，还能稳定相关束缚态，为调控非平衡电子态提供了新途径。

title: Persistent short-range charge correlations revealed by ultrafast melting of electronic order in YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{6+x}$
summary: Charge density waves (CDW) are ubiquitous in the complex phase diagram of cuprate superconductors and exhibit both short- and long-range correlations. Using time-resolved resonant X-ray scattering, we investigate the photo-induced dynamics of CDW in YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{6.67}$. We discover an excitation threshold ($Φ$$_\mathrm{C}$ $\approx$ 65 $μ$J/cm$^2$) above which long-range CDW disappear, revealing a persistent CDW peak with short-range correlation length. Ultrafast photo-excitation promptly uncovers this residual short-range CDW correlations, appearing within $\approx$ 0.2 ps. Long-range CDW coherence recovers within $\approx$ 0.6 ps, while the peak intensity remains partially suppressed. We rationalize the dichotomic behavior in the fluence and temporal dependencies as the signature of two coexisting CDW peaks, arising from short- and long-range correlations, which we disentangle through their distinct response to photo-excitation. We provide evidence that the collapse of long-range correlations is driven by an electronic process, while short-range correlations are characterized by distinct timescales and stiffness against photo-excitation. This approach establishes ultrafast X-ray scattering as an effective tool for disentangling coexisting density waves and correlations in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 通过时间分辨共振X射线散射研究YBa₂Cu₃O₆.₆₇中电荷密度波的光激发动力学，发现存在激发阈值（约65 μJ/cm²），超过该阈值长程CDW消失，揭示出具有短程关联长度的持久CDW峰。
AI.motivation: 电荷密度波（CDW）在铜氧化物超导体的复杂相图中普遍存在，同时表现出短程和长程关联。研究这些关联的光激发动力学有助于理解CDW的本质及其与超导性的关系。
AI.method: 使用时间分辨共振X射线散射技术研究YBa₂Cu₃O₆.₆₇中CDW的光激发动力学，通过不同激发通量和时间尺度分析CDW的响应。
AI.result: 发现激发阈值（约65 μJ/cm²）导致长程CDW消失，但短程CDW峰持续存在。超快光激发在约0.2 ps内揭示出残余短程CDW关联，长程CDW相干性在约0.6 ps内恢复，但峰强度部分抑制。长程关联的崩溃由电子过程驱动，而短程关联具有不同的时间尺度和对光激发的抗性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了共存的长程和短程CDW峰对光激发的不同响应，表明超快X射线散射是解耦量子材料中共存密度波和关联的有效工具。

title: Symmetric localization of $ν_{\text{tot}}=4/3$ fractional topological insulator edges
summary: Motivated by the recent twisted MoTe$_2$ experiment [arXiv:2601.18508], we develop a disordered interacting edge theory of a fractional topological insulator at $ν_{\text{tot}}=4/3$, consisting of two time-reversal-conjugated $ν=2/3$ fractional quantum Hall states. For an $S_z$-conserving edge, we uncover three distinct phases with two possible conductance values per edge in the long-edge limit: $\frac{2}{3}\frac{e^2}{h}$ and $\frac{4}{3}\frac{e^2}{h}$. In the presence of $S_z$-changing perturbations (e.g., Rashba spin-orbit coupling), an interaction-induced insulating edge state can emerge without breaking time-reversal or charge-conservation symmetry, corresponding to the absence of a topologically protected edge state. We further provide an exact mapping to a noninteracting fermionic theory exhibiting Anderson localization. Our results showcase an explicit, experimentally relevant example that the edge-state two-terminal transport is insufficient to identify the $ν_{\text{tot}}=4/3$ fractional topological insulators.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了ν_tot=4/3分数拓扑绝缘体的无序相互作用边缘理论，发现在长边缘极限下存在三种不同相，并揭示了边缘态双端输运不足以识别此类分数拓扑绝缘体。
AI.motivation: 受最近扭曲MoTe2实验的启发，研究ν_tot=4/3分数拓扑绝缘体的边缘输运特性，该体系由两个时间反演共轭的ν=2/3分数量子霍尔态组成。
AI.method: 发展了无序相互作用的边缘理论，分析了Sz守恒边缘的三种不同相，考虑了Sz改变扰动（如Rashba自旋轨道耦合）的影响，并提供了与非相互作用费米子理论中安德森局域化的精确映射。
AI.result: 在Sz守恒边缘中发现了三种不同相，每种相在长边缘极限下具有两种可能的电导值：2/3 e²/h和4/3 e²/h。在Sz改变扰动下，相互作用可以诱导出绝缘边缘态而不破坏时间反演或电荷守恒对称性，这对应于拓扑保护边缘态的缺失。
AI.conclusion: 边缘态双端输运测量不足以识别ν_tot=4/3分数拓扑绝缘体，因为相互作用可以诱导出绝缘边缘态而不破坏基本对称性，这为实验识别此类拓扑相提出了挑战。

title: A mapping-based projection of detailed kinetics uncertainty onto reduced manifolds
summary: Propagating uncertainties introduced by chemical reaction rate parameters to high-fidelity numerical simulations of complex combustion devices is necessary to ascertain impact on computational predictions. However, the high cost of detailed computations combined with the need to conduct multiple simulations to propagate uncertainty makes such an estimation computationally challenging. In order to reduce the computational cost, a two-step framework for quantifying uncertainty introduced by detailed chemical kinetics model parameters using reduced chemistry models is developed here. First, reduced-manifold states are uniquely reconstructed in full-composition space by following trajectories at an unburnt mixing state and integrating forward to a prescribed progress variable constraint. Second, parametric uncertainty is propagated by sampling perturbed rate coefficients from mechanism covariance matrices and integrating each realization to the target state, yielding uncertainty maps for reduced-space quantities. The method is applied in two configurations: a subsonic multi-tube combustor with interacting jet flames and recirculation, and a three-dimensional reacting high-speed flowpath. Uncertainty-instrumented estimated are reported for a trajectory time (time for the reconstructed unreacted mixture to reach the local target state) and for the time to equilibrium, revealing order-of-magnitude spatial variations driven by mixing, stratification, and residence-time effects. The largest relative variability occurs in low-to-intermediate temperature regimes associated with induction and the onset of heat release, where branching-related chemistry amplifies sensitivity, particularly away from stoichiometric conditions. The method provides a scalable route to spatially resolved, physically interpretable chemistry-UQ for practical reacting-flow simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出一个两步框架，利用简化化学模型量化详细化学动力学模型参数引入的不确定性，应用于复杂燃烧设备的高保真数值模拟。
AI.motivation: 化学反应速率参数的不确定性传播到复杂燃烧设备的高保真数值模拟中至关重要，但详细计算成本高且需要多次模拟，使得这种估计计算上具有挑战性。
AI.method: 开发两步框架：1）通过在未燃混合状态下跟踪轨迹并向前积分到规定的进展变量约束，在完整组成空间中唯一重建简化流形状态；2）通过从机理协方差矩阵中采样扰动速率系数并将每个实现积分到目标状态，传播参数不确定性，得到简化空间量的不确定性图。
AI.result: 应用于亚音速多管燃烧器和三维反应高速流道，报告了轨迹时间和平衡时间的不确定性估计，揭示了由混合、分层和停留时间效应驱动的数量级空间变化。最大的相对变异性发生在与诱导和热释放开始相关的低到中等温度区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实际反应流模拟提供了可扩展的、空间分辨的、物理可解释的化学不确定性量化途径。

title: Engineering photomagnetism in collinear van der Waals antiferromagnets
summary: Achieving efficient ultrafast optical control of antiferromagnetic spin dynamics is a central goal for next-generation high-speed THz spintronic and magnonic devices. Resonant optical pumping of crystal-field-split d-d orbital multiplets in magnetic TM ions directly modulates exchange and spin-orbit interactions, inducing large-amplitude coherent spin precession. However, such effects are limited to a handful of systems and there is no general strategy to enhance d-d photomagnetism in antiferromagnets. Here, we demonstrate the engineering of photomagnetism via TM-ion doping in collinear van der Waals antiferromagnets. In Mn$_{1-x}$Ni$_x$PS$_3$, small amounts of Ni$^{2+}$ activate a strong photomagnetic response while largely preserving the Néel ground state. Even 10% Ni boosts the response by more than an order of magnitude compared to pure MnPS$_3$, with resonant pumping of Ni$^{2+}$ d-d transitions driving large-amplitude coherent spin precession and providing helicity-dependent phase control. Tuning the pump energy across the full Mn$_{1-x}$Ni$_x$PS$_3$ composition range shows that Ni excitations remain effective across competing Néel and zig-zag antiferromagnetic states while supporting tunable-frequency coherent spin precession. These results establish TM-ion doping as a versatile strategy to harness orbital multiplet excitations for ultrafast, low-dissipation spin control in van der Waals antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 通过过渡金属离子掺杂在范德华反铁磁体中实现高效超快光磁控制
AI.motivation: 实现反铁磁自旋动力学的超快光学控制是下一代高速太赫兹自旋电子学和磁子器件的核心目标。目前通过共振光泵浦磁性过渡金属离子的晶体场分裂d-d轨道多重态来直接调控交换和自旋轨道相互作用的方法，仅限于少数系统，缺乏增强反铁磁体中d-d光磁效应的通用策略。
AI.method: 通过过渡金属离子掺杂工程化光磁效应，在共线范德华反铁磁体MnPS₃中掺杂Ni²⁺离子形成Mn₁₋ₓNiₓPS₃。通过调节泵浦能量在Mn₁₋ₓNiₓPS₃整个成分范围内进行实验，共振泵浦Ni²⁺的d-d跃迁驱动大振幅相干自旋进动。
AI.result: 即使仅10%的Ni掺杂也能使光磁响应比纯MnPS₃增强一个数量级以上。Ni²⁺激发在竞争的Néel和zig-zag反铁磁态中保持有效，同时支持可调频率的相干自旋进动。Ni掺杂激活了强光磁响应，同时基本保持了Néel基态。
AI.conclusion: 过渡金属离子掺杂被确立为一种通用策略，可用于利用轨道多重态激发在范德华反铁磁体中实现超快、低耗散的自旋控制。

title: Generalized Einstein Relations between Absorption and Emission Spectra in the Electric-Dipole Approximation
summary: Recently, Ryu et al. showed that two broadened bands connected by a set of four Einstein-coefficient spectra for stimulated and spontaneous single-photon transitions will obey detailed balance at equilibrium if the spectra satisfy generalized Einstein relations. Here, quantum mechanical expressions for Einstein-coefficient spectra are obtained in the electric-dipole approximation using an intramolecular Boltzmann distribution and the quantized field operators in isotropic, dispersive media of Nienhuis and Alkemade. These expressions suggest relationships between Einstein-coefficient spectra and dipole-strength spectra. The electrodynamic relationship between the spectral density for electromagnetic energy and the spectral density for the square of the electric field is developed and used to define dipole-strength spectra in terms of conditional transition probabilities per unit time. These rigorously relate dipole-strength spectra to Einstein-coefficient spectra, thus establishing quantum formulas for dipole-strength spectra and new generalized Einstein relations between dipole-strength spectra. For transitions between two bands, the dipole-strength spectra depend on a single total dipole strength but replace Einstein's degeneracy ratio and transition frequency with a change in standard chemical potential and a single underlying lineshape that is manifested differently in the four spectra. At equilibrium, the relations specify the Stokes' shift between forward and reverse transitions. The relationships between dipole-strength spectra, spontaneous emission spectral densities and stimulated transition cross sections depend on the refractive index, the dielectric constant, and the local field, but not on the derivative of the refractive index. The broadband relationships reduce to known relationships for narrow spectra inside materials and for line spectra in vacuum.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了爱因斯坦系数谱与偶极强度谱之间的量子力学关系，推导了宽带跃迁的广义爱因斯坦关系，并展示了在平衡条件下如何确定斯托克斯位移。
AI.motivation: Ryu等人先前研究表明，如果光谱满足广义爱因斯坦关系，两个展宽能带之间的单光子跃迁在平衡时服从细致平衡原理。本文旨在从量子力学角度推导爱因斯坦系数谱的表达式，并建立其与偶极强度谱的严格关系。
AI.method: 在电偶极近似下，使用分子内玻尔兹曼分布和Nienhuis与Alkemade的量子化场算子，推导爱因斯坦系数谱的量子力学表达式。发展电磁能量谱密度与电场平方谱密度之间的电动力学关系，用单位时间条件跃迁概率定义偶极强度谱。
AI.result: 建立了偶极强度谱与爱因斯坦系数谱之间的严格量子关系，推导了偶极强度谱的量子公式和偶极强度谱之间的新广义爱因斯坦关系。对于两能带间的跃迁，偶极强度谱依赖于单一总偶极强度，但用标准化学势变化和单一基础线型取代了爱因斯坦的简并比和跃迁频率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了宽带跃迁的完整理论框架，将爱因斯坦关系推广到展宽能带情况。平衡条件下，这些关系确定了正向和反向跃迁之间的斯托克斯位移。这些关系依赖于折射率、介电常数和局域场，但不依赖于折射率的导数，并在窄谱和真空线谱情况下简化为已知关系。

title: Integrability-breaking-induced Mpemba effect in spin chains
summary: We show that there are two distinct mechanisms that can cause the symmetry-restoration Mpemba effect in spin chains with \textit{weakly broken} integrability, such that the asymptotic equilibration is diffusive, but the lifetime of anomalously fast spin hydrodynamics at low temperature is parametrically large. In particular, we consider isotropic spin chains quenched out of equilibrium by suppressing the $z$-components, without inducing any net magnetisation. Initially, the restoration of isotropy is faster in hotter systems -- because they have more phase space available to scramble their initial conditions -- which may cause the equilibration curves to cross at early times in both integrable and non-integrable systems. At later times, however, the equilibration is effectively hydrodynamic, and the \textit{colder} systems start to equilibrate faster as the lifetime over which they evince superdiffusive spin hydrodynamics is parametrically larger -- but only in \textit{non}-integrable models. Depending on the details of the temperatures and the extent of the initial symmetry-breaking, two isotropy-restoration curves may have a crossing at early time, late time, neither, or both.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了弱破坏可积性的自旋链中对称性恢复的姆潘巴效应，发现存在两种不同机制：早期高温系统因相空间更大而恢复更快，后期低温系统因超扩散自旋流体动力学寿命更长而恢复更快。
AI.motivation: 研究在弱破坏可积性的自旋链中，对称性恢复的姆潘巴效应的物理机制，特别是探索早期和晚期不同温度系统恢复速度的差异及其与可积性的关系。
AI.method: 通过考虑各向同性自旋链，通过抑制z分量但不诱导净磁化来淬灭系统，分析不同温度下对称性恢复的动力学过程，比较可积和非可积模型的行为差异。
AI.result: 发现两种机制：早期高温系统因相空间更大而恢复更快（可积和非可积系统都出现），后期低温系统因超扩散自旋流体动力学寿命更长而恢复更快（仅非可积系统出现）。恢复曲线可能在不同时间出现交叉，取决于温度和初始对称性破坏程度。
AI.conclusion: 对称性恢复的姆潘巴效应在弱破坏可积性的自旋链中表现出复杂的动力学行为，早期和晚期由不同机制主导，且可积性在后期行为中起关键作用，为理解非平衡态动力学提供了新见解。

title: A unifying framework for sum rules and bounds on optical, thermoelectric and thermal transport from quantum geometry
summary: We present a geometric formulation of optical, thermoelectric, and thermal linear response in clean, zero temperature band insulators based on a single object: a generalized time-dependent quantum geometric tensor (g-tQGT) built from correlations of projected particle and heat polarization operators. Within this framework, the AC transport tensors admit compact expressions that make their geometric content explicit. The response splits into a Berry curvature contribution that remains finite in the DC limit and a frequency correction governed by the quantum metric, implying geometry driven effects even in topologically trivial insulators. At equal times, the g-tQGT recovers the usual integrated QGT and yields energy-weighted thermal analogs whose antisymmetric parts are fixed by orbital and heat magnetization. Importantly, in the thermal channel, a thermal quantum geometric tensor is obtained. Casting the theory in a Hilbert-Schmidt inner product form yields a bound on the trace of the thermal QGT, an uncertainty relation on the projected polarization operators and a purely geometric upper bound on the finite-time accumulated response. The latter is used in the optical channel to derive a geometric upper bound on the electric current. Finally, time derivatives of the g-tQGT are used to generate a hierarchy of generalized thermoelectric and thermal sum rules, and bounds on these sum rules are obtained. These bounds are used to find inequalities between different physical objects such as the optical mass, susceptibility functions and magnetizations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于广义时变量子几何张量（g-tQGT）的几何框架，用于统一描述清洁零温带绝缘体的光学、热电和热线性响应，揭示了这些响应中的几何内容并推导了相关界限和不等式。
AI.motivation: 传统线性响应理论中，光学、热电和热响应通常分开处理，缺乏统一的几何描述。本文旨在建立一个统一的几何框架，揭示这些响应中共同的量子几何结构，特别是在拓扑平凡绝缘体中几何驱动的效应。
AI.method: 构建广义时变量子几何张量（g-tQGT），该张量基于投影粒子和热极化算符的相关函数。将线性响应理论表达为希尔伯特-施密特内积形式，利用g-tQGT的时间导数生成热电磁和热求和规则，并推导相关界限。
AI.result: 1. AC输运张量获得紧凑表达式，明确显示其几何内容；2. 响应分为DC极限下保持有限的贝里曲率贡献和由量子度规控制的频率修正；3. 推导了热量子几何张量的迹界限和极化算符的不确定关系；4. 获得了有限时间累积响应的纯几何上界，用于推导电流的几何上界；5. 建立了热电磁和热求和规则及其界限，得到光学质量、磁化率函数和磁化强度之间的不等式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了清洁零温带绝缘体线性响应的统一几何理论，揭示了光学、热电和热响应中共同的量子几何结构，证明了即使在拓扑平凡绝缘体中几何效应也起关键作用，并提供了可用于实验验证的理论界限和不等式。

title: Pauli-limited upper critical field and anisotropic depairing effect of La2.82Sr0.18Ni2O7 superconducting thin film
summary: We investigate the upper critical field and superconducting anisotropy of epitaxial La2.82Sr0.18Ni2O7 thin films, which show a sharp superconducting transition at Tc=31.6 K. Near Tc, superconductivity exhibits thickness-limited two-dimensional characteristics. Upon cooling, the out-of-plane coherence length decreases below the sample thickness of 6 nm, corresponding to a 3-unit-cell film, indicating a crossover to intrinsic three-dimensional bulk superconductivity. High-field transport measurements reveal large upper critical fields with a small anisotropy ratio gama~1.34, comparable to bulk Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates. At low temperatures, the in-plane (ab) upper critical field Hc2(ab) is strongly suppressed by spin-paramagnetic pair breaking and approaches the Pauli limit (Hc2(Pauli)=58 T), while Hc2(c) remains largely unaffected. This anisotropic Pauli limitation accounts for the reduced upper critical field anisotropy and supports the conclusion that superconductivity in these films is fundamentally three-dimensional bulk like. Our results highlight the essential role of spin-paramagnetic effects in shaping the high-field superconducting phase diagram of Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates.

AI.tldr: La2.82Sr0.18Ni2O7薄膜在31.6K显示超导转变，厚度限制的二维特性在Tc附近，冷却后转变为三维体超导，上临界场大但各向异性小，自旋顺磁对Hc2(ab)的抑制导致各向异性降低。
AI.motivation: 研究Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐薄膜的超导特性，特别是上临界场和各向异性行为，以理解其超导维度和自旋顺磁效应的影响。
AI.method: 使用外延La2.82Sr0.18Ni2O7薄膜（厚度6nm，对应3个晶胞），通过高场输运测量分析上临界场和各向异性，研究相干长度随温度的变化。
AI.result: 薄膜在Tc附近显示二维特性，冷却后转变为三维体超导；上临界场大但各向异性小（γ~1.34）；Hc2(ab)受自旋顺磁对破坏强烈抑制接近泡利极限，而Hc2(c)基本不受影响。
AI.conclusion: La2.82Sr0.18Ni2O7薄膜的超导本质上是三维体超导，自旋顺磁效应在塑造Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐高场超导相图中起关键作用，各向异性降低源于Hc2(ab)的泡利限制。

title: Classical Kitaev model in a magnetic field
summary: Motivated by experiments on spin-orbit coupled magnets with Kitaev exchange in magnetic fields, we present an analysis of the classical Kitaev honeycomb model in the presence of a magnetic field. We show that there is a spin liquid regime that exists within a finite window of fields from zero up to a finite threshold before transitioning into the polarized paramagnet. We uncover constraints that spins need to satisfy in the ground state and show that they determine the exact limiting zero temperature behavior of the heat capacity and magnetic susceptibility within the spin liquid as a function of field. When the field is finite, both the two-point spin and the quadrupolar correlations are short-ranged, in contrast to the zero-field case. We rationalize an effective mass for the quadrupolar correlations in terms of a coarse-grained theory with fluctuating effective charge degrees of freedom. Finally, we show that weak site-dilution does not change the magnetization within the spin liquid -- a kind of "perfect" compensation of the site dilution.

AI.tldr: 经典Kitaev蜂窝模型在磁场中的分析，揭示了自旋液体相存在于有限磁场窗口内，并研究了其热容、磁化率等性质
AI.motivation: 受具有Kitaev交换的自旋轨道耦合磁体在磁场中实验的启发，研究经典Kitaev蜂窝模型在磁场中的行为
AI.method: 分析经典Kitaev蜂窝模型在磁场中的行为，揭示基态自旋约束条件，推导热容和磁化率的精确零温极限行为，研究关联函数和有效质量理论
AI.result: 发现自旋液体相存在于从零到有限阈值的磁场窗口内；推导了自旋液体中热容和磁化率的精确零温极限行为；有限磁场下自旋和四极关联均为短程；建立了四极关联有效质量的粗粒化理论；弱位点稀释不影响自旋液体中的磁化
AI.conclusion: 经典Kitaev模型在磁场中展现出丰富的物理行为，自旋液体相在有限磁场范围内稳定存在，其热力学性质可由精确约束条件确定，且对位点稀释具有特殊的补偿效应

title: Flexible Cutoff Learning: Optimizing Machine Learning Potentials After Training
summary: We introduce Flexible Cutoff Learning (FCL), a method for training machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) whose cutoff radii can be adjusted after training. Unlike conventional MLIPs that fix the cutoff radius during training, FCL models are trained by randomly sampling cutoff radii independently for each atom. The resulting model can then be deployed with different per-atom cutoff radii depending on the application, enabling application-specific optimization of the accuracy-cost tradeoff. Using a differentiable cost model, these per-atom cutoffs can be optimized for specific target systems after training. We demonstrate FCL with a modified MACE architecture trained on the MAD dataset. For a subset featuring molecular crystals, optimized per-atom cutoffs reduce computational cost by more than 60% while increasing force errors by less than 1%. These results show that FCL enables training of a single general-purpose MLIP that can be adapted to diverse applications through post-training cutoff optimization, eliminating the need for retraining.

AI.tldr: FCL是一种训练机器学习原子间势能的方法，允许在训练后调整截断半径，实现精度与计算成本的灵活权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统MLIP在训练时固定截断半径，无法在部署时根据应用需求灵活调整精度与计算成本的平衡，需要为不同应用重新训练模型。
AI.method: FCL通过在训练时为每个原子独立随机采样截断半径来训练模型，使用可微分成本模型在训练后针对特定目标系统优化每个原子的截断半径。
AI.result: 在MAD数据集上使用改进的MACE架构进行测试，对于分子晶体子集，优化后的原子截断半径减少计算成本超过60%，而力误差增加不到1%。
AI.conclusion: FCL使得训练单个通用MLIP成为可能，通过训练后截断优化即可适应不同应用需求，无需重新训练。

title: Towards Quantitative Reaction Dynamics of O3
summary: The reaction dynamics of O(3P) + O2(3Sigma_g-) collisions in the O3(1A') electronic ground state is characterized on a high-level MRCI+Q/aug-cc-pVQZ potential energy surface represented as a reproducing kernel. For the atom exchange reactions involving the ^{16}O and ^{18}O isotopes as the atomic collision partner, associated with rates k6(T) and k8(T), respectively, a negative temperature-dependence of k(T), consistent with experiments was found. The absolute rates typically underestimate measured rates by 50 percent, depending on the experiment considered. For the ratio R(T) = k8(T)/k6(T), the measured T-dependence was found, including a cusp at lower temperatures. The differences between experiments and computations are primarily due to neglect of quantum effects, primarily zero-point effects. For the atomization reaction, leading to 3O(3P), the rates is lower by approximately one order of magnitude compared with experiments, which is a clear improvement over simulations using previous potential energy surfaces computed with smaller basis sets. Non-adiabatic effects are deemed minor for the atom exchange reactions.

AI.tldr: 该研究在高质量MRCI+Q/aug-cc-pVQZ势能面上分析了O(3P) + O2(3Σg-)碰撞反应动力学，发现原子交换反应速率随温度升高而降低，与实验一致，但绝对值低估约50%；同位素比值R(T)的温度依赖性也被重现，包括低温下的尖点特征。
AI.motivation: 研究O(3P) + O2(3Σg-)碰撞反应动力学，特别是原子交换反应和原子化反应，旨在理解臭氧形成和分解过程中的关键反应机理，并通过高精度计算验证实验观测的温度依赖性和同位素效应。
AI.method: 使用MRCI+Q/aug-cc-pVQZ高水平方法构建势能面，并用再生核表示；分别计算了涉及^{16}O和^{18}O同位素的原子交换反应速率k6(T)和k8(T)，以及原子化反应速率；分析了温度依赖性和量子效应（特别是零点能效应）的影响。
AI.result: 原子交换反应速率随温度升高而降低，与实验一致，但计算值通常低估实验值约50%；同位素比值R(T)的温度依赖性被成功重现，包括低温下的尖点特征；原子化反应速率比实验值低约一个数量级，但相比之前使用较小基组的势能面计算有明显改进；量子效应（主要是零点能效应）是计算与实验差异的主要原因。
AI.conclusion: 高精度势能面能较好地重现O(3P) + O2(3Σg-)碰撞反应的温度依赖性和同位素效应特征，但计算值与实验值的绝对差异主要源于量子效应的忽略；非绝热效应对原子交换反应影响较小；该研究为臭氧相关反应动力学提供了更可靠的理论基础。

title: Directional information transfer between interacting Brownian particles
summary: We theoretically investigate how information flows when two particles interact with each other. Understanding the physical mechanisms of directional information flow is crucial for advancing information thermodynamics and stochastic computing. However, the fundamental connection between mechanical motion and causal information transfer remains elusive. To focus only on essential effects of physical dynamics, we examine two interacting Brownian particles confined in a one-dimensional potential. By simulating their Langevin dynamics, we quantify the causal information exchange using transfer entropy. We demonstrate that a mass asymmetry inherently breaks the symmetry of information flow, inducing a net directional transfer from the heavier to the lighter particle. Physically, the heavier particle, possessing larger inertia and higher active information storage, retains the memory of its trajectory longer against thermal fluctuations, thereby acting as a source of information. We analytically clarify that this net transfer is governed by a competition between the difference in memory capacity and the predictability of the particle trajectories. Furthermore, we reveal that the net information flow scales logarithmically with the mass ratio. These findings provide essential insights into the physical significance of transfer entropy and the nature of information flow in general physical systems.

AI.tldr: 质量不对称导致信息从重粒子流向轻粒子，信息流与质量比呈对数关系
AI.motivation: 理解物理系统中定向信息流的机制对信息热力学和随机计算至关重要，但机械运动与因果信息传递之间的基本联系仍不清楚
AI.method: 研究一维势中两个相互作用的布朗粒子，模拟其朗之万动力学，使用转移熵量化因果信息交换
AI.result: 质量不对称会打破信息流的对称性，导致净定向信息从重粒子流向轻粒子；重粒子具有更大惯性和更高的主动信息存储，能更长时间保留轨迹记忆；净信息流由记忆容量差异和轨迹可预测性之间的竞争决定，且与质量比呈对数关系
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为转移熵的物理意义和一般物理系统中信息流的本质提供了重要见解

title: Unveiling local magnetic moments in copper-oxide atomic junctions
summary: Incorporating oxygen into metallic atomic-scale junctions modifies the interatomic bonding and may even promote the formation of monoatomic chains. In the specific case of copper oxide, first-principles studies have predicted the emergence of ferromagnetic ground states, attributing certain atomic configurations with spin filtering capabilities. By means of low-temperature transport measurements, we provide a series of experimental evidence indicating the presence of local magnetism in air oxidized mechanically controllable copper break junctions. Our investigations on ultimately small contacts range from magnetotransport measurements to the analysis of anomalous shot noise in the presence of strong zero-bias anomalies. The analysis of the latter allows to determine the spin polarization (SP) of the current and that is interpreted with the Kondo physics picture.

AI.tldr: 实验证明空气氧化的铜断裂结在原子尺度接触中表现出局域磁性，通过磁输运和异常散粒噪声分析证实了自旋极化电流的存在。
AI.motivation: 先前理论研究预测铜氧化物在原子尺度结中可能出现铁磁基态并具有自旋过滤能力，但缺乏实验验证。本研究旨在通过实验探究空气氧化铜断裂结中是否存在局域磁性。
AI.method: 采用低温输运测量技术，对空气氧化的机械可控铜断裂结进行实验研究。方法包括：磁输运测量、强零偏压异常条件下的异常散粒噪声分析，并利用近藤物理图像解释自旋极化电流。
AI.result: 实验证据表明空气氧化铜断裂结在极小接触区域存在局域磁性。通过异常散粒噪声分析确定了电流的自旋极化，这些结果与近藤物理图像一致。
AI.conclusion: 氧原子掺入铜原子尺度结确实会改变原子间键合并引入局域磁性，实验证实了理论预测的磁性行为，为基于铜氧化物的自旋电子学应用提供了实验基础。

title: Gap structure and phase diagram of twisted bilayer cuprates from a microscopic perspective
summary: Since the prediction of a time-reversal symmetry breaking (TRSB) $d+id^\prime$ state in twisted bilayer cuprate superconductors by Can et al. in 2021, several experiments have attempted to detect this state, yielding conflicting results. At present, it is not clear which differences in samples or experimental conditions might explain these discrepancies. In this work, we perform a tight-binding lattice model calculation with phenomenological interlayer tunneling, examining the order parameter as a function of twist angle, interlayer tunneling, doping, and temperature. We observe the TRSB state to be correlated to the position of the Van Hove singularity in the normal state which changes not only as a function of doping but also the tunneling strength. Two such phases are identified as nominally consistent with in-plane $d+id'$ and $d+is$ order, but with unexpected transformation properties under bilayer symmetry operations. We calculate the Josephson critical current, in particular examining the angle dependence for various tunneling strengths. Finally, we discuss the existing experiments in the context of our results.

AI.tldr: 研究通过晶格模型计算分析了扭转双层铜氧化物超导体中的时间反演对称性破缺态，发现该态与范霍夫奇点的位置相关，并识别出两种相位，计算了约瑟夫森临界电流，讨论了与现有实验的关联。
AI.motivation: 自2021年Can等人预测扭转双层铜氧化物超导体中存在时间反演对称性破缺的d+id'态以来，多个实验尝试检测该态但结果相互矛盾。目前不清楚样品差异或实验条件如何解释这些分歧。
AI.method: 采用具有唯象层间隧穿的紧束缚晶格模型计算，研究序参数随扭转角度、层间隧穿强度、掺杂浓度和温度的变化关系。
AI.result: 发现时间反演对称性破缺态与正常态中范霍夫奇点的位置相关，该位置不仅随掺杂变化，也随隧穿强度变化。识别出两种相位，名义上与面内d+id'和d+is序一致，但在双层对称操作下表现出意外的变换性质。计算了约瑟夫森临界电流的角度依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为理解扭转双层铜氧化物超导体中的时间反演对称性破缺态提供了理论框架，并将计算结果与现有实验进行了对比讨论，有助于解释实验观测中的矛盾结果。

title: Disorder-induced localisation in the Mott-Hubbard model
summary: For the Fermi-Hubbard model in the Mott insulator phase, we employ the hierarchy of correlations to study how doublon and holon quasi-particle excitations are affected by adding disorder to the system. We study two types of disorder: charge disorder, in the form of on-site potential randomness; and spin disorder, in the form of a fixed, randomly generated background spin arrangement. By analysing the quasi-particle eigen-spectra and quantifying the degree to which the corresponding eigen-states localise, we find both an energetic and spatial separation between localised and delocalised states in the charge disorder. In contrast, the spin disorder results in localised states throughout the quasi-particle bands. Finally, we repeat our calculations using strong-coupling perturbation theory, and compare the results obtained from both methods.

AI.tldr: 研究无序对Mott绝缘体相中Fermi-Hubbard模型的doublon和holon准粒子激发的影响，比较电荷无序和自旋无序的局域化效应
AI.motivation: 研究无序如何影响Mott绝缘体相中的准粒子激发，特别是比较电荷无序和自旋无序对doublon和holon准粒子局域化行为的不同影响
AI.method: 使用关联层次方法分析准粒子本征谱，量化本征态的局域化程度；同时使用强耦合微扰理论进行计算，比较两种方法的结果
AI.result: 电荷无序导致局域态和离域态在能量和空间上分离，而自旋无序在整个准粒子能带中都产生局域态
AI.conclusion: 不同类型的无序对Mott绝缘体相中准粒子激发的局域化行为有显著不同的影响，电荷无序和自旋无序表现出不同的局域化特征

title: Ab initio quantum embedding description of magic angle twisted bilayer graphene at even-integer fillings
summary: Magic angle twisted bilayer graphene (MATBG) hosts narrow moiré bands with meV-scale energy splittings, making its correlated phases sensitive to both material parameters and modeling choices in low-energy downfolding. We develop an ab initio quantum-embedding workflow that derives interacting flat-band Hamiltonians from Kohn-Sham density functional theory (KS-DFT) of a relaxed, unstrained structure. Our model combines constrained random phase approximation (cRPA) screening, controlled double-counting subtraction, and an automated gauge-fixing procedure based on the selected columns of the density matrix (SCDM) that is compatible with symmetry-resolved many-body calculations. Solving the resulting models using Hartree-Fock (HF) and coupled cluster singles and doubles (CCSD), we recover robust insulating Kramers intervalley coherent (KIVC) states at charge neutrality ($ν=0$) and at electron doping ($ν=+2$). The main new physical effect appears on the hole-doped side: at $ν=-2$ we observe a fragile semimetal with a weak $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$ Kekulé modulation and enhanced intervalley-scattering peaks in the Fourier-transformed local density of states. Although the underlying KS-DFT band structure is nearly particle-hole symmetric, the effective interacting Hamiltonian exhibits a pronounced particle-hole asymmetry at $ν=\pm 2$ that we trace to momentum-dependent single-particle renormalizations generated by subtraction terms constructed from reference densities consistent with the KS-DFT filling. Our work provides a first-principles route for connecting microscopic electronic structure, screened interactions, subtraction choices, and scanning tunneling microscopy signatures in MATBG.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于第一性原理的量子嵌入工作流，用于构建魔角双层石墨烯的相互作用平带哈密顿量，揭示了电荷中性点和电子掺杂时的绝缘KIVC态，以及空穴掺杂时的脆弱半金属态。
AI.motivation: 魔角双层石墨烯的窄莫尔能带具有meV量级的能量分裂，其关联相态对材料参数和低能下折叠的建模选择非常敏感，需要建立从第一性原理出发的可靠建模方法。
AI.method: 开发了ab initio量子嵌入工作流：从KS-DFT的弛豫无应变结构出发，结合cRPA屏蔽、受控双计数扣除，以及基于SCDM的自动规范固定程序。使用HF和CCSD方法求解得到的哈密顿量。
AI.result: 在电荷中性点(ν=0)和电子掺杂(ν=+2)处发现了稳健的绝缘KIVC态；在空穴掺杂(ν=-2)处观察到具有弱√3×√3 Kekulé调制的脆弱半金属态，并显示出增强的谷间散射峰。尽管KS-DFT能带结构近乎粒子-空穴对称，但有效相互作用哈密顿量在ν=±2处表现出明显的粒子-空穴不对称性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了连接微观电子结构、屏蔽相互作用、扣除选择和扫描隧道显微镜特征的第一性原理路径，为理解MATBG中的关联相态提供了可靠的理论框架。

title: Structural and Optical Characteristics of beta-Ga2O3 Implanted with Rare Earth Ions
summary:
We investigated the structural evolution and optical properties of beta-Ga2O3 crystals implanted with different rare-earth (RE) ions using channeling Rutherford Backscattering Spectrometry, Positron Annihilation, Photoluminescence, and Photoluminescence Excitation spectroscopies. The studies reveal that implantation-induced disorder, accompanying phase transitions, and post-annealing structural recovery are largely insensitive to the implanted RE species. The defect microstructure is also found to be similar for all implanted RE ions.
  Thermal annealing does not completely remove radiation-induced defects but instead drives their rearrangement into larger defect complexes. Unimplanted (virgin) beta-Ga2O3 exhibits strong UV-visible emission attributed to oxygen vacancies, whereas the introduction of RE ions produces additional emission lines originating from electronic transitions within RE3+ ions.
  The results indicate that RE3+ ions are excited through the host conduction band, followed by non-radiative relaxation to the 4f excited states and radiative decay to the respective ground states. Fluence-dependent studies of Yb3+ reveal the onset of concentration quenching, while RE-related emission remains efficient even in the presence of substantial lattice disorder.
  These findings provide new insight into defect evolution in ion-implanted beta-Ga2O3 and clarify the excitation mechanisms of RE3+ ions, offering guidance for optimizing the optical performance of beta-Ga2O3:RE materials.

AI.tldr: 研究通过多种光谱技术分析β-Ga₂O₃晶体中不同稀土离子注入后的结构演变和光学性质，发现注入损伤和退火恢复过程与稀土种类无关，稀土离子通过基质导带激发并产生特征发射。
AI.motivation: 研究稀土离子注入β-Ga₂O₃后的结构变化和光学特性，以理解辐射损伤演化机制和稀土离子的激发过程，为优化β-Ga₂O₃:RE材料的光学性能提供指导。
AI.method: 使用沟道卢瑟福背散射谱、正电子湮没、光致发光和光致发光激发光谱等多种技术，研究不同稀土离子注入β-Ga₂O₃晶体后的结构演变和光学性质。
AI.result: 1. 注入引起的损伤、相变和退火结构恢复过程与稀土种类无关；2. 热退火不能完全消除辐射缺陷，而是驱动其重组为更大的缺陷复合体；3. 未注入样品显示强UV-可见发射（源于氧空位），稀土离子引入产生额外的RE³⁺离子内电子跃迁发射；4. RE³⁺离子通过基质导带激发，经非辐射弛豫到4f激发态后辐射衰减；5. Yb³⁺浓度依赖研究显示浓度猝灭现象，但稀土相关发射在晶格无序下仍保持高效。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了离子注入β-Ga₂O₃中缺陷演化的新见解，阐明了RE³⁺离子的激发机制，为优化β-Ga₂O₃:RE材料的光学性能提供了指导。

title: Nuclear Quantum Effects in Multi-Step Condensed Matter Chemistry: A Path Integral Molecular Dynamics Study of Thermal Decomposition
summary: Nuclear quantum effects (NQEs) are often central to a predictive understanding of chemical reactions and rates. While their incorporation in gas-phase reactions is well established, studies involving condensed matter often neglect or approximate such effects. To clarify the role of NQEs in multi-step, multi-molecular reactions in a molecular crystal, we compare atomistic simulations of the thermal decomposition of the energetic material TATB using path integral molecular dynamics (PIMD), the more approximate quantum thermal bath (QTB), and classical MD (ClMD). PIMD samples the quantum canonical distribution by representing each atom as a string of beads (replicas), while QTB uses a frequency-dependent thermostat to reproduce the Bose-Einstein distribution. We find that PIMD results in faster chemical decomposition of the TATB crystal compared to ClMD, as the initial steps involve hydrogen transfer processes. Interestingly, some of the subsequent reactions (e.g. the formation of N2) occur on identical timescales. The PIMD simulations also predict a reduction in overall activation energy by ~8% as compared to the classical result. As observed in model systems and simple unimolecular gas-phase reactions, the QTB significantly overestimates quantum acceleration of chemical reactions and the reduction in activation energy. A comparison of the kinetic energy operator in PIMD and the centroid dynamics provides insight into the physics behind the differences between the QTB and PIMD results.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了三种分子动力学方法（PIMD、QTB、ClMD）在模拟TATB分子晶体热分解中核量子效应的影响，发现PIMD预测更快的化学反应速率和更低的活化能，而QTB方法显著高估了量子加速效应。
AI.motivation: 核量子效应（NQEs）对化学反应速率预测至关重要，但在凝聚态研究中常被忽略或近似处理。本研究旨在阐明NQEs在分子晶体中多步、多分子反应中的作用，特别是针对高能材料TATB的热分解过程。
AI.method: 采用三种原子模拟方法进行比较：1）路径积分分子动力学（PIMD），通过将每个原子表示为珠串来采样量子正则分布；2）量子热浴（QTB），使用频率相关恒温器重现玻色-爱因斯坦分布；3）经典分子动力学（ClMD）。研究聚焦于TATB晶体的热分解反应。
AI.result: PIMD模拟显示TATB晶体化学分解比ClMD更快，初始步骤涉及氢转移过程，后续反应（如N2形成）时间尺度相同。PIMD预测活化能比经典结果降低约8%。QTB方法显著高估了化学反应的量子加速效应和活化能降低程度。通过比较PIMD和质心动能算符，揭示了QTB与PIMD结果差异的物理机制。
AI.conclusion: 核量子效应对分子晶体中多步化学反应具有重要影响，PIMD方法能更准确地捕捉这些效应，而QTB方法存在显著高估。研究强调了在凝聚态反应模拟中准确处理核量子效应的重要性，特别是对于涉及氢转移的初始反应步骤。

title: Dissipation- versus Chaos-Induced Relaxation in Non-Markovian Quantum Many-Body Systems
summary: In interacting quantum many-body systems, relaxation toward equilibrium reflects a competition between internal chaotic dynamics and environmental dissipation. While conventional Markovian baths typically produce exponential decay, non-Markovian dissipation can give rise to more intricate behavior, including algebraic relaxation. We study an open Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model coupled to a pseudogapped fermionic bath, using the Keldysh formalism to compute steady-state correlations in the large-$N$ limit. Our results uncover a rich dynamical phase diagram, with regimes of bath-driven power-law relaxation, chaos-driven exponential decay, and an intermediate pre-relaxation phase where exponential decay crosses over to algebraic decay. These findings demonstrate that non-Markovian environments can qualitatively reshape relaxation mechanisms in strongly correlated quantum many-body systems.

AI.tldr: 开放SYK模型耦合赝能隙费米子浴，揭示非马尔可夫耗散导致幂律弛豫、指数衰减和预弛豫相的多相图
AI.motivation: 研究量子多体系统中弛豫过程的竞争机制：内部混沌动力学与环境耗散的相互作用。传统马尔可夫浴通常产生指数衰减，而非马尔可夫耗散可能导致更复杂的行为（如代数弛豫），这在强关联量子系统中尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 采用开放Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev（SYK）模型耦合赝能隙费米子浴，使用Keldysh形式理论计算大N极限下的稳态关联函数。
AI.result: 发现了丰富的动力学相图：浴驱动的幂律弛豫区、混沌驱动的指数衰减区，以及指数衰减向代数衰减过渡的中间预弛豫相。这些结果表明非马尔可夫环境能显著重塑强关联量子多体系统的弛豫机制。
AI.conclusion: 非马尔可夫环境能从根本上改变强关联量子多体系统的弛豫动力学，产生比传统马尔可夫浴更丰富的弛豫行为，包括幂律弛豫和预弛豫相，为理解开放量子系统的非平衡动力学提供了新视角。

title: Geometry of Contact Terms in Linear Response: Applications to Elasticity
summary: Employing the Kubo linear response formalism to calculate the elasticity of anisotropic systems has been shown to yield odd elastic moduli. For Hamiltonian systems, this result seems to be contradictory as it would violate energy conservation. To resolve this discrepancy, we examine the predictions of quantum linear response in the context of our expectation from classical elasticity theory. Our framework reveals that the geometry of the space of strain perturbations introduces correction factors to the correspondence between the Kubo formula and the elastic moduli which resolves the contradiction. We use a two-dimensional gas of electrons in a magnetic field as a pedagogical example. We use generalized f-sum rules to demonstrate how contact terms may reveal themselves in experimental measurements. Finally, we discuss the implications of our results for interpreting more general linear response functions.

AI.tldr: 论文通过分析Kubo线性响应公式在计算各向异性系统弹性时的矛盾，揭示了应变扰动空间的几何结构会引入修正因子，解决了哈密顿系统中奇弹性模量违反能量守恒的问题。
AI.motivation: 使用Kubo线性响应公式计算各向异性系统弹性时会出现奇弹性模量，这与哈密顿系统的能量守恒相矛盾。需要解决这一理论矛盾，并理解量子线性响应与经典弹性理论预测之间的差异。
AI.method: 通过分析应变扰动空间的几何结构，发现其对Kubo公式与弹性模量对应关系引入修正因子。使用二维磁场中电子气作为教学示例，并应用广义f求和规则来展示接触项在实验测量中的表现。
AI.result: 揭示了应变扰动空间的几何结构会修正Kubo公式与弹性模量的对应关系，从而解决了奇弹性模量违反能量守恒的矛盾。通过二维电子气示例和f求和规则展示了接触项在实验中的可观测性。
AI.conclusion: 论文解决了Kubo线性响应在计算弹性模量时的理论矛盾，强调了应变空间几何的重要性，为更一般线性响应函数的解释提供了新视角。

title: Supercurrents in Josephson junctions with chiral molecular potentials
summary: The influence of chiral molecular potentials on phase-coherent transport in superconducting Josephson junctions is investigated. Within a Bogoliubov-de Gennes tight-binding framework, an SNS junction functionalized by adsorbed chiral molecules is modeled, where electrostatic gradients generated by the molecules induce spin-orbit coupling in the normal region. The equilibrium charge current-phase relation is found to remain largely insensitive to molecular chirality in symmetric, zero-field configurations. In contrast, the spin supercurrent exhibits a pronounced chirality-dependent response, with opposite enantiomers producing distinct and anisotropic spin-polarized Josephson currents. The resulting handedness contrast can be enhanced through control parameters such as molecular orientation and the strength of the induced spin-orbit coupling. The temperature dependence of these currents further shows that the chirality-dependent signatures persist across a range of temperatures well below the superconducting critical temperature. These results establish Josephson interferometry as a phase-sensitive and accessible platform for detecting molecular chirality and highlight spin-polarized superconducting transport as a promising route toward integrating chiral molecular functionality into superconducting spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 研究手性分子势对超导约瑟夫森结相位相干输运的影响，发现自旋超电流对手性敏感，可作为检测分子手性的平台。
AI.motivation: 探索手性分子功能如何整合到超导自旋电子器件中，研究分子手性对超导输运的影响，为检测分子手性提供新方法。
AI.method: 采用Bogoliubov-de Gennes紧束缚框架，建立吸附手性分子的SNS结模型，分子产生的静电梯度在正常区域诱导自旋轨道耦合。
AI.result: 平衡电荷电流-相位关系对手性不敏感，但自旋超电流表现出显著的手性依赖响应，相反对映体产生不同的各向异性自旋极化约瑟夫森电流。
AI.conclusion: 约瑟夫森干涉测量法可作为检测分子手性的相位敏感平台，自旋极化超导输运为整合手性分子功能到超导自旋电子器件提供了有前景的途径。

title: Long-range magnetic order with disordered spin orientations in a high-entropy antiferromagnet
comment: 10 pages, plus references, 1 table, 4 figures, and Supplementary information, accepted for publication in Nature Communications
summary: Disorder in magnetic systems typically suppresses long-range order, promoting short-range states such as spin glasses and magnetic clusters. This is particularly prominent in high-entropy materials, characterized by the random distributions of local magnetic entities and exchange interactions. However, in rare exceptions, long-range magnetic order can persist in high-entropy systems, while the microscopic characters and underlying mechanisms remain elusive, especially the magnetic behaviors of individual elements. Here, combining neutron diffraction and resonant soft x-ray scattering, we have conducted an element-specific investigation into the magnetic order of a high-entropy honeycomb-lattice van der Waals material (Mn1/4Fe1/4Co1/4Ni1/4)PS3. Despite significant atomic disorder, long-range zigzag antiferromagnetic order is observed below 72 K, with all four transition-metal elements participating in a unified phase transition. However, the spin orientations of various elements are distinct, attributed to the competition between single-ion anisotropies and exchange interactions. Our findings showcase a novel form of long-range magnetic order with disordered spin orientations, which is synergically stabilized by distinct magnetic elements in a high entropy magnet, offering a new paradigm for understanding complex magnetic systems.

AI.tldr: 高熵材料(Mn1/4Fe1/4Co1/4Ni1/4)PS3中发现了新型长程磁有序，尽管存在原子无序，但所有四种过渡金属元素都参与统一的相变，形成具有无序自旋取向的zigzag反铁磁序。
AI.motivation: 高熵材料通常因原子无序而抑制长程磁有序，但在少数例外中长程磁序能够持续存在。然而，其微观特征和机制仍不清楚，特别是单个元素的磁行为。本研究旨在通过元素特异性方法探究高熵材料中的磁有序机制。
AI.method: 结合中子衍射和共振软X射线散射技术，对高熵蜂窝晶格范德华材料(Mn1/4Fe1/4Co1/4Ni1/4)PS3进行元素特异性磁有序研究。
AI.result: 尽管存在显著的原子无序，但在72K以下观察到长程zigzag反铁磁有序。所有四种过渡金属元素都参与统一的相变，但不同元素的自旋取向存在差异，这归因于单离子各向异性和交换相互作用的竞争。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现了一种具有无序自旋取向的新型长程磁有序形式，由不同磁性元素在高熵磁体中协同稳定，为理解复杂磁系统提供了新范式。

title: Gauge transformation for pulse propagation and time ordered integrals
summary: We investigate a gauge transformation based on the successive elimination of time-dependent onsite potentials at individual sites in finite or infinite systems. Our analysis shows that this transformation renormalizes the inward hoppings by a phase factor $e^{i φ(t)}$ and the outward hoppings by $e^{-i φ(t)}$. We further demonstrate how this procedure facilitates the reduction and simulation of pulse propagation in scattering systems, while significantly simplifying the time-ordered integrals involved in the time evolution operator for time-dependent Schrodinger equation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于逐点消除含时在位势的规范变换方法，该变换使向内跃迁乘以相位因子e^{iφ(t)}，向外跃迁乘以e^{-iφ(t)}，简化了含时薛定谔方程的时间演化算符计算。
AI.motivation: 研究含时散射系统中脉冲传播的模拟问题，传统方法中时间演化算符涉及复杂的时间序积分，计算难度大，需要寻找简化计算方法。
AI.method: 提出基于逐点消除含时在位势的规范变换方法，通过变换将含时在位势的影响转移到跃迁项上，使向内和向外跃迁分别获得相反的相位因子。
AI.result: 该规范变换显著简化了含时薛定谔方程的时间演化算符计算，降低了时间序积分的复杂度，便于散射系统中脉冲传播的约化和模拟。
AI.conclusion: 提出的规范变换方法为处理含时散射系统提供了有效的计算工具，通过重新分配含时势的影响到跃迁项，大大简化了时间演化算符的计算复杂度。

title: A fully solution-processed organic microcavity laser in the strong light-matter coupling regime
summary: Solid-state semiconductor lasers underpin technologies from telecommunications and data storage to sensing, medical diagnostics, and emerging quantum communication. Polaritons-hybrid exciton-photon states have further extended this reach, enabling room-temperature quantum effects such as low-threshold lasing and single-photon nonlinearities. Organic semiconductors are ideal for polaritonics due to their large exciton binding energy, strong optical nonlinearities, and straightforward processing, making them attractive for both classical and quantum photonics. While solution-processed organic films have been widely explored, their optical cavities have almost always been fabricated using vacuum deposition, limiting the realization of truly scalable and low-cost devices. Here, we report the first organic laser microcavities fabricated entirely by solution processing, which operate in the strong coupling regimeThe resulting platform can be driven reliably to high excitation densities, where we observe a reversible, interaction-driven redistribution of the polariton condensate, revealing a distinct polariton lasing behaviour in organic microcavities. Together, the fabrication approach and the observed lasing dynamics establish a route toward scalable polaritonic and quantum photonic technologies and provide new opportunities for studying nonlinear polariton physics in organic systems.

AI.tldr: 首次实现全溶液加工有机激光微腔，在强耦合区工作，观察到可逆的极化子凝聚体重新分布，展示了有机微腔中独特的极化子激光行为。
AI.motivation: 有机半导体具有大激子结合能、强光学非线性和易加工等优点，适合极化子器件。但现有有机薄膜虽为溶液加工，其光学腔仍需真空沉积，限制了真正可扩展、低成本器件的实现。
AI.method: 开发全溶液加工方法制备有机激光微腔，使器件在强耦合区工作，并在高激发密度下研究极化子凝聚体的动态行为。
AI.result: 成功制备出首个全溶液加工的有机激光微腔，观察到可逆的相互作用驱动的极化子凝聚体重新分布，揭示了有机微腔中独特的极化子激光行为。
AI.conclusion: 该制备方法和观察到的激光动力学为可扩展的极化子和量子光子技术开辟了新途径，并为研究有机系统中的非线性极化子物理提供了新机会。

title: Violating the All-or-Nothing Picture of Local Charges in Non-Hermitian Bosonic Chains
summary: We present explicit counterexamples to a widespread empirical expectation that local commuting charges display all-or-nothing behavior. In the class of bosonic chains with symmetric nearest-neighbor hopping and arbitrary on-site terms (including non-Hermitian terms), we exhibit systems that possess k-local charges for some but not all k. Concretely, we construct non-Hermitian models with a 3-local charge but no other nontrivial local charges and models with k-local charges for all k except k = 4. These results show that the Grabowski--Mathieu integrability test based on 3-local charges is not universally applicable. We further give necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of k-local charges in this class, yielding an exhaustive classification and uncovering additional integrable models.

AI.tldr: 论文展示了局部可交换荷不总是呈现"全有或全无"行为的反例，在玻色子链中构造了具有3-局部荷但没有其他非平凡局部荷的模型，以及具有除k=4外所有k-局部荷的模型。
AI.motivation: 挑战普遍存在的经验预期，即局部可交换荷总是呈现"全有或全无"行为，证明基于3-局部荷的Grabowski-Mathieu可积性测试并非普遍适用。
AI.method: 在具有对称最近邻跳跃和任意在位项（包括非厄米项）的玻色子链类中，构造具体模型：具有3-局部荷但没有其他非平凡局部荷的非厄米模型，以及具有除k=4外所有k-局部荷的模型。
AI.result: 成功构造了反例模型，证明了局部可交换荷可以呈现部分存在而非全有或全无的行为，给出了这类系统中k-局部荷存在的充要条件，获得了详尽分类并发现了额外的可积模型。
AI.conclusion: 局部可交换荷不总是呈现全有或全无行为，基于3-局部荷的可积性测试有局限性，对这类系统的k-局部荷存在性提供了完整分类框架。

title: Deep learning statistical defect models on magnetic material dynamic and static properties
summary: The modeling of realistic magnetic materials requires the inclusion of defects. Based on the pseudospectral Landau-Lifshitz description of magnetisation dynamics, we propose a statistical model that takes into account defects, specifically vacancies. This statistical model can be integrated with deep learning techniques that correlate defect thresholds with relevant physical observables. We develop a convolutional neural network and a physics-informed neural network combined with theory of functional connections to predict the dispersion relation given defect parameters and physical constraints. A two-branch convolutional neural network is developed to predict domain-wall widths depending on defects threshold, taking into account the spatial profile and domain-wall width separately to achieve a prediction. The proposed physics-informed approaches leverage deep-learning and achieve statistical predictions measured in physical units. This is a stepping stone towards the discovery of new materials and the determination of minimal defect thresholds required for desired dynamics, states, or topological textures.

AI.tldr: 基于伪谱Landau-Lifshitz磁化动力学描述，提出考虑缺陷（空位）的统计模型，结合深度学习技术预测缺陷阈值与物理可观测量关系，开发CNN和物理信息神经网络预测色散关系和畴壁宽度。
AI.motivation: 现实磁性材料建模需要考虑缺陷影响，特别是空位缺陷。传统方法难以有效关联缺陷阈值与物理性质，需要开发结合统计模型与深度学习的新方法，为新材料发现和缺陷阈值确定提供工具。
AI.method: 1) 基于伪谱Landau-Lifshitz描述建立考虑空位缺陷的统计模型；2) 开发卷积神经网络(CNN)和物理信息神经网络(PINN)结合功能连接理论，预测给定缺陷参数和物理约束下的色散关系；3) 开发双分支CNN，分别考虑空间剖面和畴壁宽度，预测缺陷阈值相关的畴壁宽度。
AI.result: 提出的物理信息方法成功利用深度学习实现以物理单位测量的统计预测，能够预测缺陷参数与色散关系、畴壁宽度等物理性质的关系，为材料特性预测提供了有效工具。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为新材料发现和确定所需动力学、状态或拓扑纹理的最小缺陷阈值奠定了基础，展示了深度学习与物理模型结合在磁性材料缺陷研究中的潜力。

title: Ab-initio superfluid weight and superconducting penetration depth
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to Physical Review B as a regular article on the 2nd of March 2026
summary:
Machine learning and high-throughput screening approaches to superconductor discovery require physically meaningful descriptors that capture essential physics while remaining computationally tractable. The superfluid weight is an ideal descriptor as it is a prerequisite for superconductivity, determines the magnetic penetration depth and the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless transition temperature in two-dimensional materials, may limit the critical temperature in unconventional superconductors through phase coherence, and reveals quantum geometric contributions to supercurrent transport. We develop a computationally efficient framework for calculating the zero-temperature, mean-field superfluid weight for uniform pairing from density functional theory band structures and Bloch wavefunctions. We separately evaluate the conventional contribution from band curvature and the geometric contribution from quantum geometry. To validate the method, we calculate London penetration depths for a few conventional superconductors (Al, Pb, Nb, MgB$_2$, LuRu$_3$B$_2$ and YRu$_3$B$_2$) and find good agreement with experiment after accounting for nonlocal corrections, strong-coupling effects, and sample quality.
  The conventional contribution dominates by orders of magnitude in these wide-band materials, as expected. This framework provides a foundation for large-scale screening of superconducting candidates and exploring quantum geometric effects in unconventional superconductors.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于密度泛函理论的高效计算框架，用于计算零温度平均场超流体权重，作为超导体发现的关键描述符。
AI.motivation: 机器学习和高通量筛选方法需要既包含物理意义又计算可行的描述符。超流体权重是理想的描述符，因为它：1）是超导性的先决条件；2）决定磁穿透深度和二维材料中的BKT转变温度；3）可能通过相位相干限制非常规超导体的临界温度；4）揭示超电流传输中的量子几何贡献。
AI.method: 开发了计算零温度平均场超流体权重的计算框架，基于密度泛函理论的能带结构和布洛赫波函数，分别评估来自能带曲率的常规贡献和来自量子几何的几何贡献。
AI.result: 计算了常规超导体（Al、Pb、Nb、MgB₂、LuRu₃B₂和YRu₃B₂）的伦敦穿透深度，在考虑非局域修正、强耦合效应和样品质量后与实验数据良好吻合。在这些宽能带材料中，常规贡献占主导地位。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为大规模筛选超导候选材料和探索非常规超导体中的量子几何效应提供了基础。

title: Modeling anisotropic energy dissipation of light ions at the atomistic scale
summary: Understanding ion-matter interactions at the atomistic level is key to advancing materials for the semiconductor industry, space systems, and nuclear fusion technologies. However, most atomistic frameworks still rely on simplified descriptions of how ions transfer energy to the electronic subsystem, overlooking the sensitivity of this process to the actual ion path. Existing electron-ion interaction models, such as the tensorial unified two-temperature model, were developed to study self-irradiation scenarios, but their suitability for light-ion irradiation remains unexplored. Here, we propose that for light projectiles, stepping back from the tensorial formulation toward a simpler, local model of electronic stopping provides a more efficient and physically transparent trajectory-dependent description. We parameterize and validate both models for hydrogen and helium in tungsten using ab initio electronic stopping data and large-scale ion range simulations, benchmarked against existing experimental data. This provides a consistent framework for including nonadiabatic electronic stopping in atomistic simulations of light-ion energy dissipation.

AI.tldr: 提出针对轻离子辐照的简化电子阻止模型，相比张量模型更高效且物理透明，适用于氢和氦在钨中的原子尺度模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有原子尺度模拟框架对离子能量传递给电子子系统的描述过于简化，忽略了该过程对离子路径的敏感性。现有的电子-离子相互作用模型（如张量统一双温模型）是为自辐照场景开发的，但对轻离子辐照的适用性尚未探索。
AI.method: 提出针对轻离子辐照的简化局部电子阻止模型，放弃张量公式。使用从头算电子阻止数据和大型离子射程模拟对氢和氦在钨中的两种模型进行参数化和验证，并与现有实验数据对比。
AI.result: 为轻离子能量耗散提供了一致的非绝热电子阻止框架，验证了简化模型在描述氢和氦在钨中行为时的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 对于轻离子辐照，从张量模型回归到更简单的局部电子阻止模型能提供更高效且物理透明的轨迹相关描述，为原子尺度模拟提供了更好的工具。

title: Frontiers of atom probe tomography physics, data processing, and analysis
comment: 43 pages, 7 multicomponent figures, summary of workshop
summary: Atom probe tomography (APT) fills a crucial need in the characterization workflow of materials by its ability to inform the 3D chemical microstructure at the nanoscale. As with any characterization techniques, APT has strengths and limitations that inform the interpretation of the data. Therefore, a challenge for the materials characterization community, and the APT community in particular, is the need to establish repeatable and reproducible workflows around the APT data acquisition, reconstruction, analysis, and sharing, in order to inform interpretation. Data interpretation also requires the continued development of our understanding of the physical processes responsible for field evaporation. We review recent developments in the experimental analysis of field evaporation and in the modeling of field evaporation leading to new understanding of common artifacts observed in reconstructed data. We then discuss current challenges with data analysis, translation of results, and data interpretation in the absence of community-agreed standards, and therefore, the crucial need for standardization at every stage of APT research, from data collection all the way to data reporting. This perspective is a summary of the invited presentations and discussions that took place during a workshop (August 4-5, 2024, Alexandria, Virginia, USA).

AI.tldr: 原子探针层析成像（APT）在材料表征中至关重要，但需要建立可重复的工作流程和标准化，以解决数据解释中的挑战。
AI.motivation: APT在纳米尺度3D化学微结构表征中具有重要作用，但存在局限性，需要建立可重复和可再现的工作流程来指导数据解释，同时需要深入理解场蒸发物理过程。
AI.method: 回顾了场蒸发实验分析和建模的最新进展，讨论了数据采集、重建、分析和共享的工作流程挑战，强调了标准化在每个研究阶段的重要性。
AI.result: 总结了2024年8月研讨会的讨论，提出了APT社区面临的挑战：缺乏社区共识标准、数据解释困难、结果转化问题，以及标准化在数据收集到报告全过程的必要性。
AI.conclusion: APT研究需要在数据采集、重建、分析和共享的每个阶段建立标准化工作流程，以解决数据解释挑战，促进更可靠的材料表征。

title: First-Principles Electronegativity Scale from the Atomic Mean Inner Potential
comment: To be published in "Frontiers of Physics" (2026)
summary: Electronegativity is a cornerstone of chemical intuition, essential for rationalizing bonding, reactivity, and material properties. However, prevailing scales remain empirically derived, often relying on parameterized models or composite physical quantities. In this work, we introduce a universal electronegativity scale founded on the atomic mean inner potential (AMIP), also known as the average Coulomb potential, a fundamental, quantum-mechanical property accessible through both first-principles computation and electron-scattering experiments. Our scale, denoted $χ_{\mathrm{AMIP},p}$, is an analytic function of just three ground-state atomic descriptors and carries explicit physical units. It demonstrates excellent agreement with established scales and successfully classifies bonding types across 358 compounds, including adherence to the metalloid ``Si rule". Beyond replicating known trends, $χ_{\mathrm{AMIP,1/2}}$ proves to be a powerful predictive tool, accurately determining Lewis acid strengths for over 14,000 coordination environments ($R^2=0.93$) and $γ$-ray annihilation spectral widths for 36 elements ($R^2=0.97$), outperforming previous methods. By linking electronegativity directly to a measurable quantum property, this work provides a unified and predictive descriptor for electronic structure and chemical behavior across the periodic table.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于原子平均内电势（AMIP）的普适电负性标度，该标度仅需三个基态原子描述符，具有明确的物理单位，能准确预测配位环境路易斯酸强度和γ射线湮没谱宽度。
AI.motivation: 传统电负性标度多为经验推导，依赖于参数化模型或复合物理量，缺乏基于可测量量子力学性质的基础。本研究旨在建立一种基于原子平均内电势这一可通过第一性原理计算和电子散射实验获得的基本量子力学性质的电负性标度。
AI.method: 提出基于原子平均内电势（AMIP）的普适电负性标度χ_AMIP,p，该标度是三个基态原子描述符的解析函数，具有明确的物理单位。通过计算验证其与现有标度的一致性，并应用于358种化合物的键合类型分类和超过14,000个配位环境的路易斯酸强度预测。
AI.result: 新标度与现有电负性标度高度一致，成功分类358种化合物的键合类型（包括遵循"Si规则"的类金属）。在预测超过14,000个配位环境的路易斯酸强度时达到R²=0.93，预测36种元素的γ射线湮没谱宽度时达到R²=0.97，优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将电负性与可测量的量子性质直接关联，该工作为整个周期表中的电子结构和化学行为提供了一个统一且具有预测能力的描述符，为化学直觉提供了更坚实的理论基础。

title: Charge-tunable Cooper-pair diode
summary: Superconducting diodes, devices that allow Cooper-pair currents to flow more easily in one direction than the other, are set to become key building blocks for dissipationless electronics. Existing realizations, however, rely on magnetic fields, ferromagnets, or complex heterostructures that hinder integration and scalability. Here we demonstrate a diode effect for Cooper-pairs that arises solely from electron-electron interactions in nanoscale superconducting lead islands. When these islands are driven into the Coulomb blockade regime, Cooper-pair transport occurs through resonant charge states. By tuning the island's electrostatic environment, we controllably break particle-hole symmetry and induce nonreciprocal supercurrents, thereby achieving a gate-switchable superconducting diode without any external magnetic field. Our approach enables robust rectification of superconducting currents and microwave photoresponse, providing a scalable strategy to superconducting logic devices.

AI.tldr: 在纳米级铅超导岛上，通过库仑阻塞和静电调控实现无需磁场、可门控切换的超导二极管效应
AI.motivation: 现有超导二极管依赖磁场、铁磁体或复杂异质结构，阻碍了集成和可扩展性，需要开发更简单、可扩展的实现方案
AI.method: 利用纳米级超导铅岛，通过库仑阻塞机制实现库珀对共振输运，通过调控岛的静电环境可控地破坏粒子-空穴对称性，诱导非互易超电流
AI.result: 实现了无需外部磁场的门控可切换超导二极管，能够稳健地整流超导电流和微波光响应
AI.conclusion: 该方法为超导逻辑器件提供了一种可扩展策略，解决了现有超导二极管技术的集成和可扩展性问题

title: Observation of Kondo hybridization wave in UTe2
summary: Condensed matter systems with strong electronic correlations often manifest a variety of intertwined ordered phases of charge, spin, orbital and other degrees of freedom. As a prototypical strongly correlated electronic system, the Kondo lattice provides fertile soil for many fascinating quantum states, including quantum criticality, unconventional superconductivity, hidden order and topological Kondo insulator/semimetal. The foundation of Kondo physics lies in the hybridization between localized moments and itinerant electrons. Generally, the evolution of Kondo hybridization is characterized as a broad crossover rather than a phase transition. Thus far, an ordered hybridization phase has not been observed. Here, we use scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) to identify a translational-symmetry-breaking order of Kondo hybridization wave(KHW) for the first time on the surface of the spin-triplet heavy-fermion superconductor UTe2. The unprecedented phase of KHW manifests as a periodically modulated Fano lattice, accompanied by a commensurate charge density wave (CDW) and a pronounced energy gap opening near the Fermi level. This KHW-imprinted CDW has an intriguing real-space texture of complementary occupation of the heavy f and conduction charges, thereby forming a Kondo superlattice. The KHW is coexistent with superconductivity in UTe2, which may provide valuable insight into its controversial spin-triplet pairing symmetry and the underlying mechanism. Our first experimental evidence for an ordered hybridization state potentially sheds new light on the strong correlation physics of Kondo lattice system.

AI.tldr: 首次在UTe2表面观测到Kondo杂化波的平移对称性破缺有序相，表现为周期性调制的Fano晶格，伴随电荷密度波和费米能级附近的能隙打开。
AI.motivation: Kondo晶格作为强关联电子系统的原型，通常表现为杂化过程的宽交叉而非相变，此前从未观测到有序的杂化相。研究旨在探索是否存在有序的Kondo杂化态。
AI.method: 使用扫描隧道显微镜（STM）在自旋三重态重费米子超导体UTe2表面进行观测，识别Kondo杂化波的平移对称性破缺有序相。
AI.result: 首次观测到Kondo杂化波有序相，表现为周期性调制的Fano晶格，伴随共格的电荷密度波和费米能级附近的显著能隙打开，形成Kondo超晶格结构。
AI.conclusion: 首次实验证据表明存在有序的杂化态，为理解Kondo晶格系统的强关联物理提供了新视角，该Kondo杂化波与UTe2的超导性共存，可能为其有争议的自旋三重态配对对称性和机制提供重要线索。

title: Sliding Ferroelectricity Driven Spin-Layertronics in Altermagnetic Multilayers
summary: The synergy of ferroicity with altermagnetism offers a novel platform for designing multifunctional altermagnetic-spintronic device technology. In this work, we propose a mechanism to achieve nonvolatile electrical manipulation of spin and layer degrees of freedom in an altermagnetic bilayer via sliding ferroelectricity. Using first-principles calculations, we show that an interlayer translation can induce a switchable out-of-plane ferroelectric polarization in bilayer CuF2, which directly couples to and reverses the d-wave altermagnetic spin splitting. Notably, the altermangetic spin splitting is layer-locked, the sliding ferroelectricity-driven switching thus embodying a nonvolatile spin-layertronics functionality that couples spin-polarized transport and layer degree of freedom in a single platform. We show that in quadrilayer CuF2, four polarization states are identified which may offer multi-state logic device applications. These findings establish sliding ferroelectricity as a versatile tool for designing voltage-controlled, high-speed and energy-efficient spin-layertronic devices based on altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 通过滑动铁电性实现交变磁双层中自旋和层自由度的非易失性电操控，为自旋-层电子学器件提供新平台
AI.motivation: 结合铁电性和交变磁性为多功能交变磁自旋电子器件设计提供新平台，但需要实现自旋和层自由度的非易失性电操控机制
AI.method: 使用第一性原理计算，研究双层CuF2中通过层间平移诱导可切换的面外铁电极化，该极化直接耦合并反转d波交变磁自旋劈裂
AI.result: 层间平移可在双层CuF2中诱导可切换的面外铁电极化，该极化直接耦合并反转d波交变磁自旋劈裂；在四层CuF2中识别出四种极化状态，可用于多态逻辑器件
AI.conclusion: 滑动铁电性为设计基于交变磁体的电压控制、高速、高能效自旋-层电子学器件提供了多功能工具

title: Electron-phonon physics at the exascale: A hybrid MPI-GPU-OpenMP framework for scalable Wannier interpolation
comment: 30 pages, 13 figures; accepted in npj Computational Materials
summary: We demonstrate a highly efficient GPU implementation of the Wannier interpolation of electron-phonon matrix elements in the EPW code. Building on a systematic analysis of the computational complexity of the algorithm for electron-phonon interpolation, we designed a GPU porting strategy that integrates naturally into the current EPW implementation, and is seamlessly portable to NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPUs. We demonstrate this development via extensive benchmarks on conventional semiconductors such as silicon and monolayer MoS$_2$, as well as a large-scale application to topological stanene nanoribbons of width as large as 20nm, which was intractable with previous implementations. Compared to the single MPI parallelization scheme of EPW v5.9, the resulting hybrid MPI-GPU-OpenMP scheme achieves up to 29-fold speedup on leadership-class supercomputers equipped with NVIDIA and Intel accelerators, namely Vista at the Texas Advanced Computing Center, Perlmutter at the National Energy Research Scientific Computing Center, and Aurora at the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility. This framework also achieves nearly ideal scalability up to thousands of GPU nodes on the Aurora supercomputer. With this development, EPW is ready to support electron-phonon physics calculations on exascale platforms.

AI.tldr: GPU加速的EPW代码中Wannier电子-声子矩阵元插值实现，在领导级超算上获得高达29倍加速，支持大规模拓扑材料计算
AI.motivation: 传统EPW代码在处理大规模电子-声子物理计算时效率有限，特别是对于拓扑纳米带等复杂系统，需要GPU加速来实现可扩展性和高性能计算
AI.method: 通过系统分析电子-声子插值算法的计算复杂度，设计了自然集成到现有EPW实现中的GPU移植策略，支持NVIDIA、AMD和Intel GPU，采用混合MPI-GPU-OpenMP并行方案
AI.result: 在硅、单层MoS2等传统半导体以及宽度达20nm的拓扑锡烯纳米带上进行基准测试，相比EPW v5.9的单MPI方案，在领导级超算上获得高达29倍加速，在Aurora超级计算机上实现数千GPU节点的理想可扩展性
AI.conclusion: 该GPU加速框架使EPW能够支持百亿亿次级平台上的电子-声子物理计算，解决了先前无法处理的大规模系统计算问题

title: Spin Inertia as a Driver of Chaotic and High-Speed Ferromagnetic Domain Walls
summary: Ferromagnetic domain walls -transitional regions between magnetic domains- are an essential ingredient for racetrack memory, a device concept that promises to deliver faster and more compact memory storage compared to other non-volatile memory devices. Motivated by recent experiments that have found inertial effects in spin dynamics, we explore its consequences on domain wall motion. We find that the inertial dynamics of the individual magnetic moments induce massive dynamics of the domain wall. We investigate these massive dynamics driven by a magnetic field, spin-transfer torque, and spin-orbit torque. We show that, in the absence of Gilbert damping, the domain wall dynamics become chaotic, resembling that of an electron in a two-dimensional crystal. For finite damping, field-like driving of the inertial domain wall significantly increases its velocity compared to conventional massless dynamics, potentially enabling faster racetrack operations. Additionally, in the limit of low driving, we observe that the domain wall width contracts due to the spin inertia of the ferromagnet.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了铁磁畴壁的自旋惯性效应，发现惯性动力学导致畴壁呈现类质量行为，在无阻尼时产生混沌运动，有阻尼时显著提高速度，可能加速赛道存储器操作。
AI.motivation: 受近期实验中观察到的自旋动力学惯性效应启发，探索惯性对畴壁运动的影响，以改进赛道存储器（一种有前景的非易失性存储设备）的性能。
AI.method: 研究铁磁畴壁在自旋惯性作用下的动力学行为，分析磁场、自旋转移矩和自旋轨道矩三种驱动方式下的畴壁运动特性，特别关注有阻尼和无阻尼条件下的不同行为。
AI.result: 发现惯性使畴壁呈现类质量动力学：无阻尼时运动变得混沌，类似二维晶体中的电子运动；有阻尼时场驱动显著提高畴壁速度；低驱动下畴壁宽度因自旋惯性而收缩。
AI.conclusion: 自旋惯性效应为畴壁动力学引入新物理维度，可能通过提高畴壁速度来加速赛道存储器操作，为磁性存储设备性能优化提供新途径。

title: Formulation of intrinsic nonlinear thermal conductivity for bosonic systems using quantum kinetic equation
summary: Nonlinear responses in transport phenomena have attracted significant attention because they can arise even when linear responses are forbidden by symmetry, with the quantum geometry of Bloch wave functions playing an essential role. While such effects have been extensively studied in electric transport, similar quantum-geometric mechanisms are also expected to govern nonlinear thermal transport. In particular, thermal responses are crucial in bosonic systems such as magnons and phonons, which are charge-neutral quasiparticles. However, a consistent theoretical description of nonlinear thermal transport remains challenging because of the difficulty in the treatment of energy magnetization in higher-order responses with Luttinger's gravitational potential method. Here, we formulate the intrinsic nonlinear thermal conductivity of bosonic systems using a quantum kinetic equation approach that avoids Luttinger's method and naturally incorporates contributions from energy magnetization. We identify three distinct contributions to the nonlinear thermal conductivity: two expressed in terms of quantum-geometric quantities, namely the quantum metric and the thermal Berry-connection polarizability (TBCP), and a third determined solely by the band dispersions. Applying our formalism to a specific quantum spin model within linear spin-wave theory, we show that the TBCP term dominates the nonlinear thermal Hall effect in the absence of threefold symmetry. Our results differ quantitatively from those obtained using semiclassical theory, thereby highlighting the importance of quantum corrections beyond the semiclassical picture. These findings establish a general framework for intrinsic nonlinear thermal responses in bosonic systems and reveal quantum-geometric mechanisms underlying thermal transport beyond linear response theory.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了玻色子系统中非线性热传导的量子几何理论框架，揭示了超越半经典图像的量子修正重要性。
AI.motivation: 非线性响应在输运现象中具有重要意义，但非线性热输运的理论描述仍然具有挑战性，特别是在处理能量磁化方面。玻色子系统（如磁振子和声子）的热响应尤为关键，但现有方法难以处理高阶响应中的能量磁化问题。
AI.method: 采用量子动力学方程方法，避免了Luttinger引力势方法，自然地包含了能量磁化的贡献。该方法识别了非线性热导率的三个不同贡献：两个用量子几何量（量子度量和热贝里联络极化率TBCP）表示，第三个仅由能带色散决定。
AI.result: 在线性自旋波理论中应用于特定量子自旋模型，发现在缺乏三重对称性时，TBCP项主导非线性热霍尔效应。结果与半经典理论存在定量差异，突出了超越半经典图像的量子修正的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个玻色子系统中固有非线性热响应的一般框架，揭示了超越线性响应理论的热输运量子几何机制。

title: Generalized Reduced-Density-Matrix Quantum Monte Carlo Gives Access to More
summary: In quantum Monte Carlo (QMC), what can be measured efficiently is largely determined by what is sampled. When the sampled object is the partition function, a broad class of observables, including general off-diagonal operators, is typically unavailable as direct estimators. In this article, we introduce a paradigm shift by replacing the partition function with a generalized reduced density matrix (GRDM) as the simulated object. This reformulation removes the measurement bottleneck at its source and extends the dimensional-reduction advantage of reduced descriptions from static quantities to dynamical observables, thereby enabling much richer information extraction. As substantial demonstrations, the framework allows the directed-loop algorithm to measure both equal-time and imaginary-time off-diagonal observables, with the latter giving direct access to dynamical spectra.
